description: A curated list of OpenClaw resources, tools, skills, tutorials & articles. OpenClaw (formerly Moltbot / Clawdbot) — open-source self-hosted AI agent for WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord & 50+ integrations.
Clawdbot完整配置指南：从安装到Claude Code中转
🔬🦞 A self-evolving AI research colleague for scientists. 285 skills, zero hallucination, persistent memory.
Claw-Admin 是一个基于 Vue 3 构建的现代化 AI 智能体管理平台，同时支持 OpenClaw Gateway 和 Hermes Agent 两大 AI 智能体网关提供完整的 Web 管理界面。通过直观的可视化操作，用户可以轻松管理 AI 智能体、会话、模型、频道、技能等核心功能。
Open-source earning-focused swarm intelligence engine. Self-governing AI collectives (queen, workers, quorum voting) running locally via MCP. Works with Claude Code, Codex, or pay-per-use APIs.
Open-source desktop AI agent workspace with one-click Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, Hermes Agent setup and custom LLM model routing.
🤖 MateClaw — Your second brain with Multi-Agent Orchestration, MCP Protocol, Skills & Memory, Dream, and Multi-Channel Support. Built on Spring AI Alibaba.

The trust layer for agent-to-agent commerce — natural-language mandates, ERC-7710 delegated permissions, x402 payments, escrow, and dispute resolution as one open, catch-all Agent Skill / Claude Code plugin.
"Aurogen🍊: The Multi-Agent Evolution of OpenClaw."
🦀An agentic AI assistant that lives in your chats, inspired by nanoclaw and incorporating some of its design ideas. Built with Rust 🦀
Multi-agent coordination system: think Trello for OpenClaw agents.

AI Agent Orchestrator with Skills System - Give AI Agents superpowers: memory search, code graph queries, agent-to-agent messaging. Manage Claude, Codex or any AI Agent from one dashboard. Move Agents between computers and locations
Unbrowse — api native browser Skill/CLI/MCP/SDK for any agent. Auto-discovers APIs from browser traffic, generates skills on the fly to call APIs directly 100x faster, 80% cheaper locally.
🦞 Your AI Personal Assistant.  An intelligent assistant with memory, skills, and scheduled tasks that truly understands you . Helping you tackle everything in work and life.
说人话｜中文优先的去 AI 味改写 skill：保事实、分场景、改完可直接发。Chinese-first rewrite skill for Codex / Claude Code / Cursor / ChatGPT — removes AI tone, preserves facts.
Local-first macOS app to browse, search, analyze, and resume supported AI coding-agent session history across Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, Cursor Agent, Hermes, OpenClaw, Copilot CLI, and more.
A curated list of the best OpenClaw resources: official projects, skills, plugins, dashboards, deployment tooling, memory systems, and guides.
A 股多智能体智能投研系统 — 基于 TradingAgents 架构，15 名 AI Agent 模拟机构协作与实时辩论对抗，全流程可视化，支持 OpenClaw / Claude Code 集成，Docker 一键部署。
Advertising Skills for Open Claw, Claude Code & AI agents. Direct response, paid ads, funnels, and copy systems.
Run Hermes Agent and OpenClaw on the same WeChat account
Real-time token, cost, and AI limits widget with multi-device sync for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Hermes, OpenClaw, Cursor, Antigravity and more. | 为 AI Tools 打造的即时Token、成本与限额监控桌面组件，支持多设备同步
One-click backup & restore for OpenClaw instances — workspace, credentials, skills, agent history. Powered by MyClaw.ai
现已同时支持QClaw和WorkBuddy方式登录！微信包装了开源项目OpenClaw，所以我们把他的Channel抽出来给OpenClaw用了😄
The definitive resource for Agent Skills - modular capabilities revolutionizing AI agent architecture
OS-level autonomous AI agent with long-term memory, multi-agent coordination, Titan Chronos scheduler & Moltbot Social Core

Overture is an open-source, locally running web interface delivered as an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that visually maps out the execution plan of any AI coding agent as an interactive flowchart/graph before the agent begins writing code.
The best way to build a personality for your agent. Let Claude Code / OpenClaw ingest your data & build your AI soul.
沁言学术科研论文Skills库 - 177个学术研究Agent Skills的综合集合，涵盖论文检索、科学写作、生物信息、药物发现、临床医学等17个分类

Open-source self-hosted AI agent runtime and multi-agent framework for autonomous agent swarms. Agent memory, MCP tools, schedules, delegation, and 23+ LLM providers (Claude, GPT, Gemini, OpenRouter, Ollama). A practical Claude Code and LangChain alternative.

Open-source LLM router & AI cost optimizer. Routes simple prompts to cheap/local models, complex ones to premium — automatically. Drop-in OpenAI-compatible proxy for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenClaw. Saves 40-70% on AI API costs. Self-hosted, no middleman.

The local-first LLM Wiki: open-source knowledge graph builder, RAG knowledge base, and agent memory store. Built on Andrej Karpathy's pattern. An Obsidian alternative for personal knowledge management, AI second brain, and durable Claude Code / Codex / OpenClaw memory.
倪海厦视角的中医Agent Skill，基于倪海厦教学资料开发，蒸馏倪师伤寒论、金匮要略、黄帝内经、神农本草经、针灸篇等，人纪/医案/经方思维，8个诊断公式+快速诊断流程图+脉舌速查+七步走思维模式（v2.1.0新增），蒸馏129条伤寒论 · 23篇金匮 · 71篇黄帝内经 · 345种本草 · 849个医案 · 2,452页讲义
A universal git-native AI agent framework. Your agent lives inside a git repo — identity, rules, memory, tools, and skills are all version-controlled files.
A Claude skill that automatically posts personalized, authentic comments in your target communities.
Semia, security audit for AI agent skills.

Open-source cross-agent memory layer for coding agents via MCP. Compatible with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, Antigravity, OpenClaw, Hermes Agent, Oh-my-Pi, Pi, Copilot, Kiro, OpenCode, and Trae.

OpenClaw-inspired autonomous AI agent built entirely in n8n. Adaptive RAG-powered memory, Skills via MCP templates, Expert Agents with delegated sub-agents, proactive task management, media understanding - self-hosted with one setup script
Run Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor Agent and custom coding CLIs as one unified runtime for claw-style agent systems. Runs standalone, with first-class OpenClaw plugin support.
